TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ram Chandra Poudel Ram Chandra Poudel (ryax sa 15 na byacing tay 10 squ kawas na 1944 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Nepal ta' misuw hya' ga Ram Chandra Poudel, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Ram Chandra Poudel minkahul sa Tanahun na Nepal. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1944 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' ŚźĄŚúčť†ėŚįéšļļŚąóŤ°® canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ram ¶~ ®ńßan*ra pou*el ram ¶~ ®ńßan*ra pou*el (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw nepal ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ram ¶~ ®ńßan*ra pou*el, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral ram ¶~ ®ńßan*ra pou*el minkańßul s~…ēa tanańßun na nepal. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ******* ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
